title: Add ProjectUpdater app regression validation tooling
description: Follow-up validator/tooling slice delegated by claude-lab-valo after TASK-123 and TASK-124 release. Add reusable regression checks for the standalone ProjectUpdater app so future edits can verify persistence, filters, stale/due logic, and mobile/accessibility states without relying only on ad hoc browser review.
acceptance_criteria: Validator loads Projects/ProjectUpdater/app/index.html directly from file:// and exercises Dashboard, Projects, Quick Note, and Add Project flows
Validator checks localStorage persistence across reload for add-project and note/status updates
Validator checks stale, due-soon, finished, archived, and mobile-navigation/accessibility state regressions covered by TASK-123 and TASK-124
No server, build step, network dependency, or app storage-model change is introduced
Focused ProjectUpdater validator and root MAP task graph validation pass
